list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Enhance invoice management and improve navigation structure
- Exported `PaymentMethod` and `InvoiceStatus` enums in `Invoice.ts`. - Updated `Sidebar` navigation items with correct `path` properties for routing. - Replaced anchor tags in `Sidebar` with `RouterLink` components for better navigation handling. - Expanded `InvoiceView` with a detailed invoice table and styled the page layout. - Added `DashboardView` as a new placeholder view. - Integrated `DashboardView` and `/invoices` routes into the router. - Cleaned up unnecessary comments and adjusted base styles.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/angel/invoice-tasks/FrontEnd", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_interpreter_path": "node", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "ts.external.directory.path": "/home/angel/.cache/JetBrains/RemoteDev/dist/91d1d3b13b117_WebStorm-261.24374.30/plugins/javascript-plugin/jsLanguageServicesImpl/external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "vue.recent.templates": [ "Vue Composition API Component" ] } }

task.summary: Add TypeScript interfaces for Invoice, Client, and Service models

Implement initial layout and routing structure
- Added `Sidebar` component with sample navigation items. - Created `InvoiceView` as a placeholder for the invoices page. - Configured Vue Router with basic routes (dashboard redirect and invoice view). - Removed dark mode related CSS and optimized base styles. - Updated `App.vue` to integrate `Sidebar` and routing structure.

Remove example components and scaffolding; introduce invoice-related components and views
- Deleted default example components (`HelloWorld.vue`, `TheWelcome.vue`, `WelcomeItem.vue`). - Added placeholders for invoice-related components: `InvoiceForm`, `InvoicePreview`, `InvoiceTemplateOne`, `InvoiceTemplateTwo`, `InvoiceDelete`. - Created invoice-related views: `InvoiceEdit`, `InvoiceCreate`. - Updated `Sidebar` to include `path` property for navigation items.

Enhance invoice management and improve navigation structure
- Exported `PaymentMethod` and `InvoiceStatus` enums in `Invoice.ts`. - Updated `Sidebar` navigation items with correct `path` properties for routing. - Replaced anchor tags in `Sidebar` with `RouterLink` components for better navigation handling. - Expanded `InvoiceView` with a detailed invoice table and styled the page layout. - Added `DashboardView` as a new placeholder view. - Integrated `DashboardView` and `/invoices` routes into the router. - Cleaned up unnecessary comments and adjusted base styles.

Enhance invoice management and improve navigation structure
- Exported `PaymentMethod` and `InvoiceStatus` enums in `Invoice.ts`. - Updated `Sidebar` navigation items with correct `path` properties for routing. - Replaced anchor tags in `Sidebar` with `RouterLink` components for better navigation handling. - Expanded `InvoiceView` with a detailed invoice table and styled the page layout. - Added `DashboardView` as a new placeholder view. - Integrated `DashboardView` and `/invoices` routes into the router. - Cleaned up unnecessary comments and adjusted base styles.

MESSAGE.value: Add TypeScript interfaces for Invoice, Client, and Service models

Implement initial layout and routing structure
- Added `Sidebar` component with sample navigation items. - Created `InvoiceView` as a placeholder for the invoices page. - Configured Vue Router with basic routes (dashboard redirect and invoice view). - Removed dark mode related CSS and optimized base styles. - Updated `App.vue` to integrate `Sidebar` and routing structure.

Remove example components and scaffolding; introduce invoice-related components and views
- Deleted default example components (`HelloWorld.vue`, `TheWelcome.vue`, `WelcomeItem.vue`). - Added placeholders for invoice-related components: `InvoiceForm`, `InvoicePreview`, `InvoiceTemplateOne`, `InvoiceTemplateTwo`, `InvoiceDelete`. - Created invoice-related views: `InvoiceEdit`, `InvoiceCreate`. - Updated `Sidebar` to include `path` property for navigation items.

Enhance invoice management and improve navigation structure
- Exported `PaymentMethod` and `InvoiceStatus` enums in `Invoice.ts`. - Updated `Sidebar` navigation items with correct `path` properties for routing. - Replaced anchor tags in `Sidebar` with `RouterLink` components for better navigation handling. - Expanded `InvoiceView` with a detailed invoice table and styled the page layout. - Added `DashboardView` as a new placeholder view. - Integrated `DashboardView` and `/invoices` routes into the router. - Cleaned up unnecessary comments and adjusted base styles.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Enhance invoice management and improve navigation structure
- Exported `PaymentMethod` and `InvoiceStatus` enums in `Invoice.ts`. - Updated `Sidebar` navigation items with correct `path` properties for routing. - Replaced anchor tags in `Sidebar` with `RouterLink` components for better navigation handling. - Expanded `InvoiceView` with a detailed invoice table and styled the page layout. - Added `DashboardView` as a new placeholder view. - Integrated `DashboardView` and `/invoices` routes into the router. - Cleaned up unnecessary comments and adjusted base styles.
